questions.q: In a May 6, 2026 press release, ASUS announced their Computex 2026 booth will feature an experimental zone celebrating the 20th anniversary of which iconic hardware brand?
questions.correctText: ASUS is celebrating the 20-year milestone of Republic of Gamers (ROG), which was originally formed in 2006, at Computex 2026.

questions.q: It was confirmed on May 5, 2026, that actor Jonathan Tiersten passed away at the age of 60. Which 1983 cult horror film was he best known for?
Which Battlefield 4 map was confirmed to be returning in Battlefield 6 Season 3, according to a gameplay trailer released on May 6, 2026?
questions.correctText: The May 6 gameplay trailer revealed that Golmud Railway is returning as an expanded, reimagined map called 'Railway to Golmud'.

questions.q: Pittsburgh Pirates reliever Chris Devenski was suspended following an on-field incident for intentionally throwing at which Cincinnati Reds rookie in early May 2026?
Which tennis star suggested a boycott might be needed over the prize money share issue at the 2026 French Open?
As part of his 'MAHA' push, Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. initiated a campaign in May 2026 to wean Americans off of which class of medications?
Following years of being sidelined due to distribution constraints, which Eugen Systems World War II real-time strategy game was officially re-released on Steam on May 6, 2026?
questions.correctText: R.U.S.E. made its return to Steam on May 6, 2026, complete with all its original DLCs and full Steam Deck support.

questions.q: According to CDC data highlighted in May 2026, which U.S. state saw its tuberculosis cases hit a 12-year high, significantly outpacing the national average?
Who was crowned the 2026 World Snooker Champion after defeating Shaun Murphy 18-17 in a dramatic final?
A Subnautica 2 developer vlog released on May 6, 2026, confirmed that the highly anticipated underwater survival sequel will launch in Early Access for what price?
questions.correctText: Unknown Worlds Entertainment announced in their May 6 Dev Vlog that Subnautica 2 will cost $29.99 at its Early Access launch.
